debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
i : Fin d
μ : Fin d → Measure ℝ
inst✝ : ∀ (i : Fin d), IsProbabilityMeasure (μ i)
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : Integrable f (μ i)
⊢ Integrable (fun a => f (a i)) (Measure.pi μ)

failed_attempts:
have h : (Measure.pi μ).map (· i) = μ i := MeasureTheory.Measure.map_eval_pi μ i
  rw [← h] at hf
  exact hf.comp_measurable (measurable_pi_apply i)

have : Integrable (f ∘ (fun a ↦ a i)) (Measure.pi μ) := by
    apply Integrable.comp_measurable hf (measurable_pi_apply i)
    rw [Measure.map_apply (measurable_pi_apply i) MeasurableSet.univ]
    simp only [Set.preimage_univ]
    have h : (Measure.pi μ) Set.univ = 1 := measure_univ
    have hmap : (Measure.pi μ).map (fun a ↦ a i) = μ i := Measure.pi_map_apply_univ μ i
    rw [← hmap]
    exact ae_eq_univ.mp rfl
  exact this

have h : (Measure.pi μ).map (fun a ↦ a i) = μ i := Measure.pi_map_eval μ i
  rw [← h] at hf
  exact hf.comp_measurable (measurable_pi_apply i)
exact hf.comp_measurable measurable_pi_apply

have : (fun a ↦ f (a i)) = f ∘ (fun a ↦ a i) := rfl
  rw [this]
  apply Integrable.comp_measurable hf measurable_pi_apply
  exact MeasureTheory.Measure.map_pi_apply_eq_snd μ i

have : Integrable (f ∘ (fun a ↦ a i)) (Measure.pi μ) := by
    apply Integrable.comp_measurable hf (measurable_pi_apply i)
    rw [Measure.map_apply (measurable_pi_apply i) MeasurableSet.univ]
    simp only [Set.preimage_univ]
    have : (Measure.pi μ) Set.univ < ⊤ := measure_lt_top _ _
    constructor
    · exact MeasurableSet.univ.nullMeasurableSet
    · convert this
      ext s hs
      rw [Measure.map_apply (measurable_pi_apply i) hs]
      rw [Measure.pi_pi (μ := μ) (Set.pi_preimage_apply_eq_pi i s)]

      conv_rhs => rw [← one_mul (μ i s)]
      congr 1
      apply Finset.prod_eq_one
      intro j hj
      simp only [Finset.mem_erase] at hj
      simp [hj.1.symm]
  exact this
